### Hi, I'm Brian Kuria 👋

**AWS Certified Solutions Architect · Data Scientist · Backend Engineer**  
Based in Nairobi, KE — building systems that are intelligent, scalable, and production-ready.

I'm passionate about the intersection of **cloud infrastructure**, **machine learning**, and **clean backend architecture**. Whether it's deploying a churn prediction model, designing a containerised API, or wiring up cloud-native pipelines, I care about work that actually runs in the real world.

**→ [kobeyvines.github.io](https://kobeyvines.github.io)**

---

#### 🔧 Stack

```
Languages     Python · Go · C++
Cloud & DevOps  AWS (SAA-C03) · Docker · Kubernetes · NGINX
Backend       FastAPI · Django REST · Node.js
Data & ML     Pandas · Scikit-Learn · TensorFlow · Jupyter
Databases     PostgreSQL · MongoDB · MySQL · Firebase
```

---

#### 🚀 Selected Projects

| Project | Description | Stack |
|---|---|---|
| [Churn Prediction Model](https://github.com/Kobeyvines/CASE_STUDY) | End-to-end ML case study diagnosing and improving a churn model for a mobile money platform | Python, Scikit-Learn, Pandas |
| [E-Commerce Backend](https://github.com/Kobeyvines/alx_project_nexus_2.0) | Full backend system with auth, inventory, cart, and order processing | Django, Docker, PostgreSQL, Celery |
| [Titanic ML Pipeline](https://github.com/Kobeyvines/Titanic_dataset) | Voting Classifier (SVM + Random Forest) with FastAPI backend, Docker, deployed on Render | FastAPI, Docker, Scikit-Learn |
| [Airbnb Nairobi Analysis](https://github.com/Kobeyvines/airbnb_analysis_nairobi) | Data analysis of Airbnb listings and pricing trends across Nairobi | Python, Pandas, Jupyter |

---

#### 📝 Latest Writing

I write on [Medium](https://medium.com/@kobeyvines) about data science, Python engineering, and working with cloud infrastructure.

- [Nairobi Airbnb Market Analysis](https://kobeyvines.github.io/blog/airbnb-analysis-nairobi) — rental trends and pricing factors across the city
- [Food Prices in Kenya 2007–2025](https://kobeyvines.github.io/blog/food-prices-analysis-in-kenya20072025) — 18 years of agricultural price data
